name: hestia-codex
description: Hestia governance for a foreign Codex occupant: fail-closed scope + egress + society-safety gate (fires on shell/apply_patch/MCP), witness log, and identity continuity. Pair with sandbox_mode=workspace-write + network_access=false in config.toml — the sandbox is the write/egress boundary; this gate is the shell/edit gate. See hestia/plugins/codex/README.md.
